zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Strother於大約1326年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Alan de Strother33歲，母親Constance de Lyham29歲。他於大約1345年與Margaret De Blenkinsop在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Strother于大约1326年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Alan de Strother33岁，母亲Constance de Lyham29岁。他于大约1345年与Margaret De Blenkinsop在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strother
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place somewhere in northeastern England formerly called (The) Strother, named with Middle English strother, struther, stroder ‘wooded marshland, marsh covered in brushwood’ (Old English strōther). This topographic term was current in Durham, Northumberland, and southern Scotland, but the place which gave rise to the surname has not been certainly identified. A locality called le strother is recorded near the city of Durham c. 1299, while another, recorded as le estrother in 1153–95, may have named Strother House in Boldon (Durham), unless the house was named from the surname. William de Strother was a tenant in nearby Offerton, in 1473, and he was probably a member of the Newcastle merchant-cum-gentry family from whom all or most modern bearers inherit their surname. In Northumberland, possibilities include Cold Strother in Kirkheaton and Haughton Strother, although there is no evidence for either place being known simply as The Strother. Alternatively, The Strother may have been a lost district name for either the marshy area around Cold Strother (north of the North Tyne) or that around Haughton Strother (on the south bank of the North Tyne), but again evidence is lacking. The (del) Strother family owned estates near (but not in) both places from at least the late 14th century. In southern Scotland, Struther in Lanarkshire and Struthers in Ayrshire and Fife (from the Older Scots equivalent of Middle English strother) might be considered, but for lack of supporting evidence it has been suggested that Scottish Strother is probably the attested Northumberland surname, whose bearers were major landholders on the Scottish border.
History: A William Strother is recorded in VA in 1673, probably the same man who, as William Strouder, was granted land in 1658.

variants.name: Struth
meanings: Scottish: topographic name from Older Scots stroth(e) ‘marshy place’. Compare Strother , Struthers .

variants.name: Struthers
meanings: English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): probably a variant of Strother , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Strother was born about 1326, in Northumberland, England, his father, Alan de Strother, was 33 and his mother, Constance de Lyham, was 29. He married Margaret De Blenkinsop about 1345, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Strother est né environ 1326, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Strother, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Constance de Lyham, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Blenkinsop environ 1345, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Strother um 1326 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Strother 33 und seine Mutter Constance de Lyham 29. Er hat um 1345 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Margaret De Blenkinsop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1381 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Strother è nato il circa 1326 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Alan de Strother, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Lyham, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Blenkinsop circa 1345, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Strotherが約1326年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Alan de Strotherは33歳，母Constance de Lyhamは29歳であった。約1345年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでMargaret De Blenkinsopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Strother(이)가 대략 1326년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Strother(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Lyham(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Margaret De Blenkinsop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Strother nasceu aproximadamente 1326, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Strother, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Lyham, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Blenkinsop aproximadamente 1345, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Strother родился около 1326 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Strother было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Constance de Lyham, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Blenkinsop около 1345 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Strother nació aproximadamente 1326, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Strother, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Constance de Lyham, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret De Blenkinsop aproximadamente 1345, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
